scripts.verify: npm run typecheck && npm run build && LOOM_SMOKE_CHAT=1 npm run smoke
scripts.knowledge:refresh: npm run ingest && npm run search && npm run rag && npm run knowledge:prune
scripts.app: npm run build && cd macos-app/Loom && find . -maxdepth 1 -type d -name 'Loom *.xcodeproj' -exec rm -rf {} + && xcodegen generate && xcodebuild -project Loom.xcodeproj -scheme Loom -configuration Release build && cd ../.. && node scripts/install-loom-app.mjs auto; code=$?; node scripts/clean-loom-app-bundles.mjs; if [ $code -eq 0 ]; then echo '✓ Loom.app installed'; fi; exit $code
scripts.app:user: npm run build && cd macos-app/Loom && find . -maxdepth 1 -type d -name 'Loom *.xcodeproj' -exec rm -rf {} + && xcodegen generate && xcodebuild -project Loom.xcodeproj -scheme Loom -configuration Release build && cd ../.. && node scripts/install-loom-app.mjs user; code=$?; node scripts/clean-loom-app-bundles.mjs; if [ $code -eq 0 ]; then echo '✓ Loom.app installed to ~/Applications'; fi; exit $code
scripts.app:system: npm run build && cd macos-app/Loom && find . -maxdepth 1 -type d -name 'Loom *.xcodeproj' -exec rm -rf {} + && xcodegen generate && xcodebuild -project Loom.xcodeproj -scheme Loom -configuration Release build && cd ../.. && node scripts/install-loom-app.mjs system; code=$?; node scripts/clean-loom-app-bundles.mjs; if [ $code -eq 0 ]; then echo '✓ Loom.app installed to /Applications'; fi; exit $code
scripts.app:open: if [ -d "$HOME/Applications/Loom.app" ]; then open "$HOME/Applications/Loom.app"; else open /Applications/Loom.app; fi
